arts.ttl: Potential Boro line-up for Blackburn with big Rav van den Berg decision
arts.sum: Boro are currently second in the Championship form table, which is in contrast to the hosts on Friday, who are bottom based on the last six games after a terrible start for new boss Valerien Ismael. For Michael Carrick, he’ll be hoping his side can continue where they left off after a much-improved second half performance against Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers boss lays down gauntlet to Todd Cantwell with clear message
arts.sum: Valerien Ismael wants to see more from the former Rangers midfielder

arts.ttl: Current Championship form gives Middlesbrough a strong chance in comparison to rivals
arts.sum: But with games against Burnley, West Brom and Middlesbrough, Frank Lampard’s side by no means have an easy run-in, which is reflected in the form table of their opponents. Carrick’s side are second in the form table but, based on current league position, only Blackburn and Bristol City have a harder run than Boro.

arts.ttl: EFL announcement that could prove important for Middlesbrough if ambitions aren't met
arts.sum: Details of the Carabao Cup first-round and the final games of the season were also part of the announcement. The EFL confirmed key dates for next season, including Fixture Release Day and the first game of the season.
There is a full programme of Championship action to look forward to this weekend and Tom McGarry has provided a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: 22-year-old has played his last game for Blackburn Rovers as Ismael confirms season-ending injury
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers loan man Owen Beck has seen his season ended with Valerien Ismael confirming he faces eight… The post 22-year-old has played his last game for Blackburn Rovers as Ismael confirms season-ending injury appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers injury latest as two players suffer major setbacks
arts.sum: Valerien Ismael will be with two more players for the remainder of the season

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers confirm first contract renewal after 16-month wait
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers have signed up one of their five out of contract players

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough boss weighs in on Blackburn Rovers chaos and makes play-off claim
arts.sum: The former Manchester United star gave his view on a turbulent week at Ewood Park

arts.ttl: How Middlesbrough are developing huge quality needed 'if you want to be successful'
arts.sum: Instead, in ensuring they get the results needed to leave them outside the play-off places on goal difference alone ahead of Friday evening’s trip to Blackburn Rovers, Boro have shown a different side to their game - and it’s something they’ve often lacked this season, and something Carrick admits is a key quality to have if you want to be successful. “And when it gets a little bit tighter and tougher in games, yeah, we've shown some really good signs over recent weeks.
